title: Ambiguous Bulk Refund Spec
competency: 02. Spec Framing - Requirements decomposition and testable spec creation
domain: Bulk refund operations for marketplace orders
mission: Convert a vague product request for bulk refunds into a testable spec before touching the React implementation.
outcome: A vague refund request becomes a shippable vertical slice with acceptance tests, not a prettier requirements document.
seededDefects: partial refunds ignore already-refunded line items
failure state does not preserve selected orders
agentWorkflow: Ask the coding agent to inspect this lab contract, starter code, docs, and tests before proposing a plan.
Revise the agent plan so it exercises the competency practice and avoids the common mistake.
Implement the smallest working change that addresses the seeded defects.
Run the verification gates and capture command evidence before writing the final review note.
workingDeliverables: Working React behavior for the selected refund slice.
Unit/component tests covering eligibility, limits, auth, and failure states.
A short spec file linked to the tests, not replacing them.
Command evidence showing the slice passes build and tests.
seniorSignals: Use the ambiguous ticket and fixtures to ask product questions, then freeze assumptions in a small implementation contract.
Implement the bulk refund UI behavior for eligible, partially eligible, and blocked orders.
Add validation and failure-state tests from concrete Given/When/Then examples.
Keep non-goals out of the diff and prove the slice is independently reviewable.
